MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development, is present. Represented by Abdul Dos.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Anthony Dellard, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-06-2010 is vacated.
